title: psilocarphus oregonus
intro: Psilocarphus oregonus, also known as Oregon woollyheads, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in wetlands and along streams in the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Psilocarphus oregonus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and treat minor wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
